ques: Compare the prices and total travel time of non-stop flights from Mexico City to Frankfurt, departing on July 5, 2026, and returning on July 15, 2026.
answer: Only one non-stop option exists on MEX→FRA for these dates: Lufthansa, €1,504 round-trip total. Outbound Jul 5 (MEX 7:50 PM → FRA 2:50 PM) = 11 hr; Return Jul 15 (FRA 1:30 PM → MEX 5:30 PM) = 12 hr (total ~23 hr round trip). No other non-stop flights are available to compare.
